head: dense_fg_aux
hypothesis: P3: MV3-Small low-weight coverage probe. Large objects (area>0.15) suffer from pred_too_small — flatfish_2 mIoU ~0.09. Asymmetric coverage penalty only penalizes under-coverage (pred covers <100% of GT). Weight=0.05 (conservative, not dominating SmoothL1+DIoU). Single variable vs E-45 (MV3-Small, 8ep). Success: IoU_large +0.02, flatfish_2 +0.03, pred_too_small decreases, pred_too_large does NOT increase >20%. No-go: pf_mIoU drop >0.02, pred_too_large increase >20%, any non-large size bin drop >0.03, flatfish_2 degrades.
